title: Surya Ka Yaarana
subTitle: A soldier going on a rescue mission, hears about his father's death by lung cancer and mournfully looks back on his memories of how he helped him in matters of love and life.

title: The Fighter Mard No. 1
subTitle: An honest police officer, Prabhakaran, puts a notorious gangster, Easwaramoorthy, behind bars. When Easwaramoorthy learns of his identity, he decides to take revenge by targeting Prabhakaran's sister.

title: Friday The 13th
subTitle: The 13th page of a mysterious book harbours evil. It gives rise to a series of devastating events as people who read it, get possessed by demonic spirits.

title: Nagashaurya's Aswathama
subTitle: A man returns to India for his sister's engagement ceremony but discovers that something terrible has happened to her. On his quest for the truth, he uncovers a series of crimes against women.

title: LIE
subTitle: Sathyam and Chaitra meet unexpectedly in their pursuit of making quick money. Soon, after they fall in love, Sathyam encounters Padmanabham, a criminal on the run from the Indian police.

title: Manjulika Returns 2
subTitle: Four strangers across different walks of life serendipitously meet at a haunted graveyard. However, luck turns to misery when an insidious force awakens.

title: Geethanjali Malli Vachindi
subTitle: Sreenu receives a directorial offer from Vishnu to shoot in a bungalow. Later, he and his crew realise that Vishnu orchestrated the ploy to seek revenge by trapping them in a haunted house.

title: Satyabhama
subTitle: ACP Satyabhama embarks on an investigation into a missing person case, which leads her to uncover dark secrets hidden within the town. However, as she delves deeper, her past begins to haunt her.

title: Sita Ram
subTitle: Ram, a young boy, lives in a monastery waiting for Sita to return and take care of him. However, Sita returns, years later, but with an ulterior motive.

title: Hidimbha
subTitle: In Hyderabad, a series of murders targets young girls. Later, officers Aadhya and Abhay investigate as more victims disappear, soon discovering a common link among them.

title: Nartanasala
subTitle: Radha Krishna, who runs a self-defence class for women, falls in love with Manasa. When his father fixes his marriage with Satya, he comes up with a lie to escape from the situation.

title: Nartanasala
subTitle: Radha Krishna, who runs a self-defence class for women, falls in love with Manasa. When his father fixes his marriage with Satya, he comes up with a lie to escape from the situation.

title: Sivudu
subTitle: A carefree young man's life is disrupted by rising crime in his locality and when his family faces danger, he decides to fight back.

title: Vasco The Rebel
subTitle: With unwavering support from his lover, a defiant young man carves his way into the mafia world. His journey takes a turn when a relentless police officer pursues him.

title: Stalin
subTitle: Stalin, a former army officer, is deeply moved by the suicide of a girl with physical disabilities. So, he devises a plan to extend unconditional help to those who need it to establish peace.

title: Inttelligent
subTitle: A successful software engineer becomes a vigilante following the demise of his mentor in a bid to seek revenge against those responsible for the latter's death.

title: Dumdaar Khiladi
subTitle: A man and a woman develop a great bond after the latter arrives in Hyderabad. However, they realise their love for each other when the woman's marriage is arranged to a person of her parent's choice.

title: Kadamban
subTitle: Kadamban lives a peaceful life with the villagers in a remote forest in Tamil Nadu. Things take a turn when a business tycoon decides to drive his tribe out of the area in order to extract minerals.

title: Roberrt
subTitle: Raghava, the head cook in a catering unit, leads a peaceful life with his son Arjun. However, their bliss is short-lived as Raghava's past comes back to haunt him.

title: ACP Shiva
subTitle: An IPS officer treads the path of corruption, but when his dishonest ways prove costly, he must decide whether to seek righteous revenge.

title: The Fighterman Singham 2
subTitle: When a happy-go-lucky policeman accidentally detains a man who is actually a wanted gangster, he finds himself in a big dilemma.

title: Manik Baasha
subTitle: Bound by a promise to his late father, a gangster becomes an autorickshaw driver. However, when his past catches up with him, he must choose between succumbing to his old ways and keeping his word.

title: Manik Baasha
subTitle: Bound by a promise to his late father, a gangster becomes an autorickshaw driver. However, when his past catches up with him, he must choose between succumbing to his old ways and keeping his word.

title: Inteqam
subTitle: Vijay, a dedicated police officer, is shattered to discover his brother Aftab is a ruthless criminal. Torn between duty and love, Vijay embarks on a relentless quest to bring him to justice.

title: Mawali Raaj
subTitle: In order to obtain a family of their own, two young children of two single parents devise a plan to bring them together.

title: International Khiladi: The Iron Man
subTitle: Amrita's parents get killed. Years later, she falls in love with Aditya only to learn that he was the one who was accused of her parents' murder.

title: Conjuring Kannappan
subTitle: When a man plucks a feather off a dreamcatcher, he has nightmares where injuries reflect in the real world. But when this affects his family and friends, they decide to find the root of the problem.

title: DD Returns
subTitle: An event manager and his friends hide the money they stole in a haunted bungalow to evade the police but when they go back to retrieve it, the ghosts force them to play a dangerous game.

title: MCA: Middle Class Abbayi
subTitle: Nani, a middle-class boy with an eidetic memory, helps save his sister-in-law from a goon. Meanwhile, he also tries to convince his girlfriend's father to marry her off to him.

title: Saindhav
subTitle: A man with a traumatic past is compelled to encounter an crime boss so that he can rescue his daughter from a health problem.

title: Dangerous Khiladi 2
subTitle: A corrupt minister's daughter finds a diary containing details about a couple's relationship. When the story ends abruptly, she sets out to find the person who wrote it.

title: Choron Ka Chor
subTitle: Choron Ka Chor
